name: niu-image-gen
description: Generate and edit images through configurable APIs, discover upstream models, and save the user's selected image model.

interface.shortDescription: Image generation with API model discovery and batch mode.
interface.longDescription: Generate and edit images through configurable OpenAI-compatible APIs. Query the upstream model catalog, highlight likely image-model candidates, let the user select a model, and save it alongside protocol, host, port, request paths, API key, quality controls, and batch settings.
defaultPrompt: I want to generate some images
